name: answeroverflow
tagline: ClawHub (178★): Search indexed Discord community discussions via Answer Overflow. Find solutions to coding problems, library issues, and co
verdict: Solid quality and file hygiene. Two gaps: no version or changelog to track changes, and no stated boundary, so as a general-purpose search tool it could get pulled into tasks a more specific skill would handle better. Security is clean.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' / exclusion / out-of-scope language anywhere in the skill, despite being a general-purpose search skill that could misfire on adjacent tasks.
No version field, changelog, or dated revision notes anywhere in the file.
